Maybe You Should Know a Bit About CI/CD: Deploying to Render.com with CD

Knowing a bit about CI/CD is genuinely useful as a developer — even on a side project, you can put it to work. This post covers what CI/CD actually is, the YAML basics behind GitHub Actions, how workflows are structured (Event → Runner → Job → Step), and a full walkthrough of building a PR-check workflow (ESLint + Jest) and a deploy workflow that ships to Render.com via Deploy Hooks.
